description.value: Your blood works to assist you and even helps others who try to heal your wounded form. You can use @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Battle Medicine] and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Treat Wounds] without a medkit, and your allies don't need a medkit to use Battle Medicine on you or Treat your Wounds. The first time each day, when someone rolls a failure or a critical failure on a check to use Battle Medicine on you or Treat your Wounds, the magic in your blood coagulates to assist and increases the degree of success by one step, even if you're @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Unconscious].
